title: How I Got My Thickest Hair Ever: A Holistic Guide to Hair Renewal
meta_description: First I'll show you the "after" photo. The snapshot above is what my hair looks like now—and this is even postpartum, with little baby hands pulling it out on a regular basis!But my hair hasn't always been this thick. Here's what it looked like before I figured out how to get it to stop falling out (below). It was super wispy, even though I cut it shorter to try to make it look fuller.I made some tweaks to my diet and haircare regimen, with the help of a few inexpensive products, and my hair got much thicker. Yay!I've put it all together in one guide, so you can do exactly what I did. Double yay!You can unlock your thickest, healthiest hair, naturally. In How I Got My Thickest Hair Ever, I share the simple, holistic methods I used to stop shedding and regrow fuller hair.Note: This isn't a "quick fix." It's a detailed plan to restore your hair that actually worked for me.If you’ve been feeling like your hair isn’t there for you like it once was, be encouraged. If I can get my thickest hair ever at age 50, after having a baby at 49, with baby fine hair to start with, surely you can recover what was lost too!(P.S. No AI was used in the writing of this guide—it's straight from baby nap time to you)
